name: Pheasant in Almond Red Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Almond Red Sauce as directed in Sowest 2.
2. Cut the pheasant into serving pieces and ensure it weighs between 2 1/2 to 3 lbs.
3. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
4. Cook pheasant, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides, about 15 to 18 minutes.
5. Remove the pheasant from the skillet and set aside.
6. Reduce heat to low, return the cooked pheasant to the skillet, stir in broth and Almond Red Sauce.
7. Bring mixture back to a simmer, then reduce heat to maintain a gentle simmer.
8. Cover and continue cooking until the pheasant is fully cooked through, approximately 30 minutes longer.
9. Skim any fat that rises to the surface of the sauce.
10. Serve hot with the almond red sauce on top.
